mapper.insert: INSERT INTO after_sale (after_sale_no, user_id, order_id, order_item_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, type, reason, description, voucher_images, original_price, original_quantity, original_total_amount, status) VALUES (#{afterSaleNo}, #{userId}, #{orderId}, #{orderItemId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{type}, #{reason}, #{description}, #{voucherImages}, #{originalPrice}, #{originalQuantity}, #{originalTotalAmount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM after_sale WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE after_sale SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE after_sale SET status = 1, refund_amount = #{refundAmount} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE after_sale SET status = 2, reject_reason = #{rejectReason} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE after_sale SET status = 3, return_company = #{company}, return_tracking_no = #{trackingNo} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE after_sale SET status = 6, exchange_company = #{company}, exchange_tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, supplement_id = #{supplementId} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE after_sale SET supplement_id = #{supplementId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM after_sale WHERE order_item_id = #{orderItemId} AND status IN (0,1,3,4,5,6)
